defs: bound set of bamboo slips used for record keeping (old)
classifier for written items: chapter, article
space occupied on a printed page
chapter; section (of a written work); passage of writing; (fig.) chapter (in the history of sth)
abbr. for Yupian 玉篇[Yu4 pian1] and Guangyun 廣韻|广韵[Guang3 yun4]
